description_long: This is a stylized adult figure dressed in formal business attire, featuring a fitted blazer and matching trousers over a collared shirt. The figure stands upright with arms extended horizontally, suggesting a neutral or T-pose. The head is rounded with a smooth, simplified facial structure and a medium-length, side-parted hairstyle. The hands are open and fingers are slightly separated, while the feet are positioned close together. The shoes are formal and complement the business outfit. The overall appearance is clean and professional, suitable for representing a businessperson or office worker in an urban environment.
description: A stylized adult in formal business attire with a blazer, trousers, collared shirt, and formal shoes, standing upright with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full business outfit, facial features, and open hands with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side-parted hairstyle, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blazer, trousers, and the hairstyle's length and shape.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm, and the straight alignment of the body.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair with side part
